xwikidoc.name: SecurityAdvisoryApplicationTranslations
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.content:
# Class fields SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_status=状態 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_status_draft=下書き SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_status_completed=完了 ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_status_announced=Announced SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_status_disclosed=公開済 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_title1=タイトル SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_title_hint=アドバイザリーのタイトル SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_product=製品 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_product_hint=影響される製品（xwiki-platform、xwiki-rendering、application-change-requestなど） SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_advisoryLink=アドバイザリーのリンク SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_advisoryLink_hint=GitHubのアドバイザリーのリンク ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_computeEmbargo=compute embargo ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_computeEmbargo_hint=Define if the embargo date should be computed automatically from versions or not. ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_embargoDate=Embargo date ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_embargoDate_hint=Define a specific embargo date: this one is only taken into account if the compute embargo date flag is not checked. SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_cvss=CVSSのスコア SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_cvss_hint=文字列の形式での計算済のCVSSの値。 ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_cvssScore=CVSS Score ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_cvssScore_hint=Score corresponding to the CVSS vector. SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_description=説明 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_description_hint=アドバイザリーの全文。 ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_preventOverride=Prevent override ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_preventOverride_hint=Check to prevent overriding data in case of Github import. ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_ecosystem=Ecosystem ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_ecosystem_hint=Package ecosystem for the vulnerable package (e.g. Maven or NPM) ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_packageId=Package Identifier ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_packageId_hint=Identifier of the vulnerable package ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_vulnerableVersionRange=Vulnerable versions range ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_vulnerableVersionRange_hint=Range of versions of the given package that are affected by the vulnerability ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_patchedVersions=Patched versions ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_patchedVersions_hint=List of versions of the given package that have been patched
# Sheet keys securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.description=このページでは、セキュリティーアドバイザリーアプリケーションのページが閲覧と編集モードで表示される様式を調整できます。 securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.noObject=現在のページには、セキュリティーアドバイザリーアプリケーションのオブジェクトがありません。 securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.noFields=セキュリティーアドバイザリーアプリケーションに、表示するフィールドがありません。
# Live table generic keys securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.title=ページのタイトル securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.name=ページ名 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.space=スペース securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.fullname=ページの完全な名称 ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.location=Location securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.author=最終更新者 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.creator=作者 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.date=日付 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.creationDate=作成日 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._avatar=アバター securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._images=画像 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._attachments=添付ファイル securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._actions=アクション securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._actions.edit=編集 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._actions.delete=削除 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.emptyvalue=-
# Live table specific keys securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.status=状態 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.title1=タイトル securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.product=製品 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.mavenModules=Mavenのモジュール securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.affectedVersions=影響されるバージョン securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.patchedVersions=修正済のバージョン securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.advisoryLink=アドバイザリーのリンク securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.jiraTickets=JIRAのチケット ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.computeEmbargo=compute embargo ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.embargoDate=Embargo date ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.cvss=CVSS ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.cvssScore=CVSS Score ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.description=Description
# Other keys ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.entry.name=Security Advisory Application ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.home.right.warning=The {0}security entry space{1} is currently open to any users: you should restrict its access.
# Configuration ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_embargoDurationUnit=Unit of the duration to use for the embargo computation ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_embargoDurationUnit.hint=The unit is based on ChronoUnit values (e.g. minutes, hours, days, weeks, months, etc) ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_defaultEmbargoDuration=Duration value to use for the embargo computation ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_defaultEmbargoDuration.hint=This value computed with its unit will be added to the date of the latest patched release date for the advisory publication ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_securityGroup=The group of targeted users for advisories notifications SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_securityGroup.hint=このグループのユーザーは、アドバイザリーの公開準備が完了した際に自動的に通知を受信します。 ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_dataSpace=Security entries space location ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_dataSpace.hint=The reference of the space where to store security entries (default: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.SecurityEntries) ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_importerUser=Importer user ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_importerUser.hint=The user used as author for imported entries ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_githubToken=Github Token ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_githubToken.hint=The Github token to use for importing security advisories ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_githubRepositoriesSlug=Github Repositories ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_githubRepositoriesSlug.hint=The list of Github repositories to use in automatic import. The value can be a repository slug in the form orga/repo (e.g. xwiki/xwiki-platform) or it can be an organization (e.g. xwiki).
# Administration - configuration and data migration ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.admin.settings.heading=Configuration ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.heading=Data migration ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.description=Migrate existing security advisories to the new data model: the impacted packages are moved to dedicated objects and the CVE identifier is migrated. The migration runs as a background job and is safe to run multiple times. ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.candidates=Advisories still using the legacy data model: {0} ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.button=Migrate advisories ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.finish.success=The security advisories have been successfully migrated to the new data model. ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.finish.error=An error occurred while migrating some security advisories. See the log below for details. ### Missing: job.log.label.securityadvisory.datamigration=Migration log
# Sheet Explanations securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.nextstep.DRAFT=アドバイザリーの下書きを編集しています。完了後、ページの上部にあるボタンから完了済に設定できます。 ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.nextstep.COMPLETED=Now the advisory is complete, you should announce it to the dedicated channels defined in the security policy. Once the advisory is announced you can switch its status with the button on top of the page. ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.nextstep.ANNOUNCED=This advisory has been announced. It will be automatically marked as disclosable when the embargo date will be reached. It's possible that the embargo date is not yet computed if the patched versions are not released yet. ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.nextstep.DISCLOSABLE=This advisory can now be disclosed according to its embargo date. You should request a CVE and publish it. Once done you need to mark it disclosed with the button on top of the page. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.nextstep.DISCLOSED=アドバイザリーを公開しました。 ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.severity=Severity
# Deprecated keys securityadvisoryapplication.dataSpace.title=データ
